lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.CfnAbout: Provides a statement the Amazon Lex conveys to the user when the intent is successfully fulfilled.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.ClosingResp.Description: The response that Amazon Lex sends to the user when the intent is complete.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.Conditional.Description: A list of conditional branches associated with the intent's closing response. These branches are executed when the `nextStep` attribute is set to `EvalutateConditional`.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.IsActive.Description: Specifies whether an intent's closing response is used. When this field is false, the closing response isn't sent to the user. If the `IsActive` field isn't specified, the default is true.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.NextStep.Description: Specifies the next step that the bot executes after playing the intent's closing response.
